next_steps: Perform a bone biopsy of a lesion for histopathology and cultures
Perform a liver or splenic biopsy for tissue diagnosis
Order serology for Bartonella henselae (IgG and IgM)
Perform comprehensive infectious disease workup (Bartonella PCR, QuantiFERON-TB Gold, fungal studies)
Complete blood count with peripheral blood smear and flow cytometry
Test for Chronic Granulomatous Disease (DHR flow cytometry or NBT test)
Bone biopsy for histopathology, microbiology, and molecular studies
CBC with peripheral smear and inflammatory markers (ESR, CRP)
Consultation with pediatric infectious disease, rheumatology, and oncology
